# Scrimba Guide

> Independent guide to Scrimba courses, learning paths, pricing, and comparisons. Built by a developer who completed 40+ Scrimba courses and all 4 career paths.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://scrimbaguide.tech/): Scrimba review, pricing, and path guide for 2026
- [What is Scrimba?](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/intro/): Complete guide to the platform
- [Learning Paths](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/paths/): Compare all 4 career paths
- [Scrimba Pricing](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/pricing/): Up-to-date pricing breakdown
- [Scrimba vs Alternatives](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/comparisons/): 13 platform comparisons
- [All Courses](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/courses/): 86+ courses by topic
- [Blog](https://scrimbaguide.tech/blog): Reviews, guides, career advice
- [About](https://scrimbaguide.tech/about/): Author credentials and review process

## Learning Paths
- [Frontend Developer Path](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/paths/frontend-developer-path/): HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React — best for complete beginners
- [Fullstack Developer Path](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/paths/fullstack-developer-path/): Frontend + backend + AI — best for career changers
- [Backend Developer Path](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/paths/backend-developer-path/): Node.js, Express, SQL — best for frontend devs
- [AI Engineer Path](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/paths/ai-engineer-path/): Agents, RAG, MCP — best for developers adding AI skills

## Pricing
- [Scrimba Pricing Guide](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/pricing/): Full breakdown
- [Pro vs Free](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/pricing/pro-vs-free/): Feature comparison
- [Student Discount](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/pricing/student-discount/): Student pricing info
- [Scrimba vs Bootcamps](https://scrimbaguide.tech/docs/pricing/scrimba-vs-bootcamps/): Cost comparison
